/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode-16.2.0.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/stella-typechecker.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stella-typechecker.dir/src/antlr4/codegen/stellaLexer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stella-typechecker.dir/src/antlr4/codegen/stellaParser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stella-typechecker.dir/src/antlr4/codegen/stellaParserBaseVisitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/stella-typechecker.dir/src/antlr4/codegen/stellaParserVisitor.cpp.o" -o stella-typechecker -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  /opt/homebrew/opt/antlr4-cpp-runtime/lib/libantlr4-runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation
